% Auto-generated source-truth intake stub for ID3602.
\tzpentry{ID3602}{Dipole Magnetic Field}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID3602 introduces Dipole Magnetic Field as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{equation} \vec{B}_{\text{dipole}}(\vec{r}, \vec{\mu}, \vec{r}_0) = \frac{\mu_0}{4\pi} \left[\frac{3(\vec{r} - \vec{r}_0)(\vec{\mu} \cdot (\vec{r} - \vec{r}_0))}{|\vec{r} - \vec{r}_0|^5} - \frac{\vec{\mu}}{|\vec{r} - \vec{r}_0|^3}\right] \end{equation}
